nasb.text: Every grain offering, mixed with oil or dry, shall belong to all the sons of Aaron, to all alike.

esv.text: And every grain offering, mixed with oil or dry, shall be shared equally among all the sons of Aaron.

cnv.text: 一切用油調和，或是乾的素祭，都要歸給亞倫所有的子孫，大家均分。

ccb.text: 但调油的或干的素祭要归亚伦的子孙，由他们均分。
